headline: Is Carnival (CCL) Still Attractively Priced After Recent Pullback In Cruise Stocks
summary: If you are wondering whether Carnival Corporation & is still attractively priced or if the easy gains are behind it, you are in the right place. The stock last closed at US$28.53, with a 9.7% decline over the past week and a 5.0% pullback over 30 days, while the 1 year return sits at 30.8% and the 3 year return is very large. Recent news has focused on Carnival Corporation & as a key name in the cruise and travel sector. There has been ongoing attention on demand for leisure travel and the...
